channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Outside 64, 9th April
item.description:
Big hole where road core has come through
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 64, Arle Gardens, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road is ruined, 9th April
item.description:
This bit of road is ruined. There are no lines in the road either. Just resurface it instead of doing shoddy patch jobs.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Hesters Way, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Road marking white lines or studs

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 9th April

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 9th April
item.description:
CW: Edge deteration (Perm Repair) Has been made safe. 10000mmx1100mmx115mm TM: STOP and GO W3w. ///interrupt.talkative.voted (CW6 Edge Deterioration)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin, 9th April
item.description:
Overflowing bin litter flying around every where

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmleaze, Elmbridge, Gloucester
